blueprints.name: Scrum
blueprints.description: Standard Scrum blueprint with canonical Scrum roles and starter artifacts.

roles.name: Product Owner
roles.description: Owns the backlog and prioritization.

roles.name: Scrum Master
roles.description: Facilitates the Scrum process.

roles.name: Developer
roles.description: Builds and delivers backlog items.

artifacts.title: Scrum Backlog
artifacts.description: Initiales Product Backlog für das Team.

artifacts.title: Sprint Board Setup
artifacts.description: Visualisierung des aktuellen Sprints.

artifacts.title: Burndown Chart
artifacts.description: Tracken des Fortschritts im Sprint.

artifacts.title: Roadmap
artifacts.description: Langfristige Planung und Meilensteine.

artifacts.title: Setup & Usage Instructions
artifacts.description:
### Setup & Usage Instructions
1. Clone the template repository and create a new repository based on the cloned one.
2. Customize the template by updating the content of the README file and any other files you see fit.
3. Add your teammates as collaborators to the repository.
4. Set up an integration (e.g., with GitHub Actions) to automate the
creation of a new sprint branch whenever the team is ready to start a new sprint.
5. Set up your project and workflow in the Bitte interface, such as
assigning work items to team members or setting up notifications for completed tasks.
6. Use the template’s sprint board to plan and execute on each sprint.
7. Use the burndown chart to track progress towards completing user stories and reaching your sprint goals.
8. Use the roadmap to visualize upcoming milestones and help teams plan their work accordingly.
9. Use Bitte’s project and team settings to manage your team,
such as setting up access levels or adding new members to your team.

blueprints.name: Scrum-OpenCode
blueprints.description: Scrum blueprint adapted for OpenCode-centered delivery with explicit execution cascade for OpenCode, ShellGPT, and direct terminal work.

roles.name: Product Owner
roles.description: Owns backlog readiness, acceptance criteria, and artifact expectations.

roles.name: Scrum Master
roles.description: Facilitates delivery flow, blocker removal, and explicit handoffs.

roles.name: Developer
roles.description: Implements, verifies, and returns code/artifact changes through the OpenCode workspace flow.

artifacts.title: Backlog Intake And Story Slicing
artifacts.description: Shape the current goal into sprint-ready stories with explicit acceptance criteria, dependencies, and handoff notes for worker execution.

artifacts.title: Execution Cascade Agreement
artifacts.description: Define when the team should use OpenCode sessions, ShellGPT, or direct terminal commands so every worker follows the same execution contract.

artifacts.title: Workspace And Artifact Sync
artifacts.description: Establish how workspace files, artifact outputs, and rag_helper context are read, updated, and returned to the hub after each task.

artifacts.title: Vertical Slice Delivery
artifacts.description: Implement one end-to-end increment in OpenCode-first mode, including changed files, verification evidence, and artifact handoff.

artifacts.title: Review And Definition Of Done
artifacts.description: Review code, artifacts, and verification results before closing sprint work. Capture residual risks and any follow-up tasks explicitly.

artifacts.title: OpenCode Scrum Default Policy
artifacts.description: Default policy profile for teams instantiated from this blueprint.

blueprints.name: Kanban
blueprints.description: Standard Kanban blueprint with flow-oriented roles and starter artifacts.

roles.name: Service Delivery Manager
roles.description: Oversees service delivery and flow metrics.

roles.name: Flow Manager
roles.description: Optimizes WIP limits and flow.

roles.name: Developer
roles.description: Delivers work items and maintains quality.

artifacts.title: Kanban Board
artifacts.description: Visualisierung des aktuellen Flusses und der WIP-Limits.

artifacts.title: Flow Metrics Review
artifacts.description: Durchsatz, Lead Time und Blocker regelmaessig ueberpruefen.

blueprints.name: Research
blueprints.description: Operational research blueprint for evidence collection, synthesis, and reporting.

roles.name: Research Lead
roles.description: Owns research scope, synthesis quality, and final recommendations.

roles.name: Source Analyst
roles.description: Collects, validates, and classifies sources.

roles.name: Reviewer
roles.description: Checks assumptions, coverage, and evidence quality.

artifacts.title: Research Intake
artifacts.description: Capture research objective, constraints, and expected deliverable shape.

artifacts.title: Source Collection
artifacts.description: Collect and classify primary sources and repository/context evidence.

artifacts.title: Synthesis Report
artifacts.description: Produce a concise, cited research summary with recommendations.

artifacts.title: Research Default Policy
artifacts.description: Default policy profile for teams instantiated from this blueprint.

blueprints.name: Code-Repair
blueprints.description: Operational code-repair blueprint for incident triage, patching, and regression checks.

roles.name: Repair Lead
roles.description: Owns incident diagnosis and repair plan.

roles.name: Fix Engineer
roles.description: Implements targeted fixes with minimal blast radius.

roles.name: QA Verifier
roles.description: Verifies regressions and completion criteria.

artifacts.title: Incident Triage
artifacts.description: Reproduce issue, identify impact scope, and define repair strategy.

artifacts.title: Repair Implementation
artifacts.description: Apply minimal, targeted patch and preserve compatibility.

artifacts.title: Regression Validation
artifacts.description: Add/adjust tests and verify bug is fixed without side effects.

artifacts.title: Code Repair Default Policy
artifacts.description: Default policy profile for teams instantiated from this blueprint.

blueprints.name: TDD
blueprints.description: Test-Driven Development blueprint for behavior-first changes with explicit Red -> Green -> Refactor evidence.

roles.name: Behavior Analyst
roles.description: Defines behavior statement, boundaries, and acceptance expectations before code changes.

roles.name: Test Driver
roles.description: Owns red/green test execution and evidence tracking for the TDD cycle.

roles.name: Refactor Verifier
roles.description: Validates minimal patch scope, optional refactor safety, and final verification evidence.

artifacts.title: TestPlanArtifact
artifacts.description: Capture expected behavior, constraints, and concrete test intents before implementation.

artifacts.title: RedTestResultArtifact
artifacts.description: Execute the new/updated test first and record expected red-phase failure evidence.

artifacts.title: PatchPlanArtifact
artifacts.description: Prepare minimal implementation patch scope that turns the red test green without broad side effects.

artifacts.title: GreenTestResultArtifact
artifacts.description: Re-run relevant tests and record green-phase pass evidence after minimal implementation.

artifacts.title: RefactorChecklist
artifacts.description: Optionally refactor while preserving green test evidence and explicit verification gates.

artifacts.title: TDD Default Policy
artifacts.description: Default policy profile for teams instantiated from this blueprint.

blueprints.name: Security-Review
blueprints.description: Operational security-review blueprint for control validation and remediation guidance.

roles.name: Security Lead
roles.description: Owns review scope, severity model, and sign-off.

roles.name: Security Analyst
roles.description: Executes technical review and evidence collection.

roles.name: Compliance Reviewer
roles.description: Checks policy and compliance obligations.

artifacts.title: Threat Review
artifacts.description: Map attack surface, trust boundaries, and escalation paths.

artifacts.title: Control Validation
artifacts.description: Validate least-privilege, policy checks, and audit coverage.

artifacts.title: Security Findings Report
artifacts.description: Summarize findings with severity, remediation, and verification plan.

artifacts.title: Security Review Default Policy
artifacts.description: Default policy profile for teams instantiated from this blueprint.

blueprints.name: Release-Prep
blueprints.description: Operational release-preparation blueprint for readiness, verification, and rollout planning.

roles.name: Release Manager
roles.description: Coordinates release scope, schedule, and go/no-go decision.

roles.name: Verification Engineer
roles.description: Runs release validation and preflight checks.

roles.name: Operations Liaison
roles.description: Prepares deployment/rollback operations.

artifacts.title: Release Readiness Checklist
artifacts.description: Validate release scope, blockers, and dependency state.

artifacts.title: Verification Sweep
artifacts.description: Run final validation for tests, migrations, and quality gates.

artifacts.title: Deployment And Rollback Plan
artifacts.description: Prepare rollout sequence, monitoring, and rollback criteria.

artifacts.title: Release Prep Default Policy
artifacts.description: Default policy profile for teams instantiated from this blueprint.

blueprints.name: Research-Evolution
blueprints.description: Official DeerFlow+Evolver blueprint for extending an existing project with a small feature through research, proposal, review, and next tasks.

roles.name: Research Lead
roles.description: Owns DeerFlow research scope, source quality, and the decision-ready context report.

roles.name: Evolution Strategist
roles.description: Owns Evolver analysis and reviewable proposal generation from approved research context.

roles.name: Review Gate Owner
roles.description: Owns human review gates, validation expectations, risk sign-off, and next task selection.

artifacts.title: Standardfall Scope
artifacts.description: Define the official demo case: extend an existing project with one small feature, including constraints, affected areas, and expected evidence.

artifacts.title: DeerFlow Research Stage
artifacts.description: Use DeerFlow for research, source comparison, repository context enrichment, and a decision-ready research report artifact.

artifacts.title: Evolver Proposal Stage
artifacts.description: Use Evolver only after research to produce reviewable evolution proposals linked to the DeerFlow report and hub-owned task context.

artifacts.title: Review Gate
artifacts.description: Review research artifacts, proposal risk, validation needs, and next tasks before any controlled apply path is considered.

artifacts.title: Research Evolution Default Policy
artifacts.description: Default policy profile for teams instantiated from this blueprint.
